name: 💔Sudi Baccay
description:
(Heartbreaker!user)

“This is how to be a heartbreaker~”

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟜𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ?】

Alt: Est. Relationship - Exes: You come back to university after being gone for a year and find Sudi as the new campus heartbreaker

Inspired by "How to be a Heartbreaker" by MARINA

Whoo! Two bots on one day yall 🗣️🗣️. I hope you enjoy, he is a sweetheart ;). Don’t really got much to say because I yapped a bunch on the last bot 😈

Also if you guys could do me a favor, I’d be so very happy 🥺. I would really appreciate it if you could give me your opinions on something that TOTALLY won’t be related to an alt of this bot 🤭🤭. How do you guys feel about bad/mean!user? I personally struggle with bad/mean!user because I always feel so guilty about it since the bots are usually the sweetest guys ever 😭😭. I know though that some people actually quite enjoy portraying bad/mean!user, and since you guys are the ones who will be using the bot, I wanted to know if you guys would want a bot where it is established that {{user}} is a bad person. Or if you’re like me and would rather that not happen. ANYWAY IF YOU COULD JUST TOSS ME A SCRAP OF YOUR OPINION ID BE REALLY THANKFUL 🙏

Love you all <33

Art does NOT belong to me: Art belongs to @Rinotuna on twitter!! Thank you to @Foxy_Haeven as always for being such a life saver ;))
creator: Alladeeznuts
